inputs.name: experiment_spec
inputs.description: Accept a controlled Octave task specification for issue and dispatch.

outputs.name: task
outputs.description: Emit the normalized Octave task specification for downstream probing and compilation.

provides.name: octave.task.issue
provides.description: Issue Octave script_run, function_eval, and numeric_benchmark tasks.

requires.name: octave.environment.probe
requires.description: Require environment readiness before executable planning.

requires.name: octave.script.compile
requires.description: Require wrapper-first compilation for accepted task specifications.
